_meta.description: Numeric bound patterns that appear repeatedly in canonical problem sets. When a rewrite's constraints section matches one of these, prefer the CodeBite doctrine bound from cdoctrine_hint instead.

forbidden_regex.rationale: Very common small-array bound in well-known problem sets. Replace with 2x10^3 / 8x10^4 / 2x10^5 per CodeBite doctrine.
Common medium-array bound. Replace with 8x10^4 or 2x10^5 per doctrine.
Common value bound (-10^9 to 10^9). Replace with 10^8 per doctrine.
Common value/length bound. Replace with context-appropriate doctrine bound.
Avoid referencing INT_MAX this way. Use absolute value like 10^8 or 2x10^9 if really needed.
Decisive fingerprint from canonical design-problem call counts. Use 2x10^4 or 5x10^4.
Canonical Sudoku grid size. If a Sudoku-style problem, change grid size (e.g., 4x4 minigrid or NxN general).
Canonical design-problem window / trace length. Replace with 180 / 500 / another distinctive number.
Common design-problem call cap. Change to 1.5x10^4 or 8x10^3 etc.
Soft warn — fine to keep but consider rephrasing 'printable ASCII' to 'lowercase Latin letters' etc. for tighter bounds.

cdoctrine_hint.large: n <= 2 * 10^5  (requires O(n) or O(n log n))
